data.body: EPIC CLOSED OUT — merged. PR #57 (https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/pull/57) merged to main. State: epic + all 8 children (S1 hoot-glove-foyer, S2 clay-feast-strife, S2b dodgy-luff-quasar, S3 pale-peer-hawk, S4 ill-hazel-probe, S4b piney-gold-day, S5 harm-shove-gate, S6 vain-weed-rave) closed with certified completion-verifier signatures; full suite green, lint clean. A post-merge completeness/safety audit surfaced 5 gaps (discovered_from this epic), ALL remediated + closed in the same PR with certified signatures: e95a (run_workflow agent steps now run inside the snapshot gate + fenced behind REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM), d6cc (runtime fail-closed safeguard — config.assert_gated at the runner's agent-tool wiring, so a future ungated agent op raises), e6f9 ([snapshot] + REBAR_GATE_* flags in docs/config.md), 9af8 (GitHub-Actions shallow/detached-HEAD materialize test), efd0 (end-to-end attested gate against a non-rebar sample repo). No open work remains under this epic.
